name: Rhubarb Applesauce Pie
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 425°F. Combine applesauce with rhubarb, sugar, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and tapioca; mix well. Pour into pastry-lined 9-inch pie pan. Dot with butter. Cover with lattice pastry top. The filling will boil over some, so place on a cookie sheet. Bake for about 50 minutes or until the filling starts to bubble and crust is golden. Per serving: 380 calories, 18 grams fat, 14 milligrams cholesterol, 390 milligrams sodium.
